name: Create Simple Machines Diagrams
description: A 3rd-grade science teacher needs a visual aid flipchart to introduce Simple Machines. Create a 3-page ActivInspire flipchart saved to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/simple_machines_lesson.flipchart. Page 1 must feature the title 'Simple Machines' and a list of the six types: Lever, Wheel and Axle, Pulley, Inclined Plane, Wedge, and Screw. Page 2 must be titled 'The Lever' and include the definition 'A rigid bar resting on a pivot' along with a diagram using shapes (triangle for the fulcrum, rectangle/line for the beam, and a shape for the load) and text labels 'Fulcrum' and 'Load'. Page 3 must be titled 'The Inclined Plane' and include the definition 'A flat supporting surface tilted at an angle' along with a diagram using shapes (triangle for the ramp and a shape for the object) and the text label 'Ramp'.
